Notice Of Hearing (On Petition To Confirm Arbitration)
Off Calendar Nov-13-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing (On Petition To Confirm Arbitration)
Off Calendar Nov-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ethan Andelman, Esq. 510-990-3585 of Andelman Legal for Petitioner.
Ira Leshin, Esq. 415-399-1000 for Respondent Aisar Elvin Khan.

RULING - A R G U E D. Respondent Argues, cites case, requests declaration be filed and be part of the record, threshold issue. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes)

PETITIONER DANIEL MYTELS' Petition To Confirm Arbitration.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Petitioner Daniel Mytels' petition to confirm contractual arbitration award is granted. (see word minutes for full details)

Order, statement of Decision and Judgment are signed. (see scanned documents for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Petitioner Daniel Mytels Notice Of Hearing (On Petition To Confirm Arbitration)
Off Calendar Oct-04-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Petitioner Daniel Mytels Notice Of Hearing (On Petition To Confirm Arbitration) is a duplicate entry.

Notice Of Hearing (On Petition To Confirm Arbitration)
Off Calendar Oct-04-2018 Continued To Nov-13-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. Ethan B. Andelman of Andelman legal, tel. No. 1-510-990-3585 appearing for
the Petitioner;
Atty. Ira Leshin, Tel. No. 1-415-399-1000 appearing for the Respondent.

RULING - A R G U E D; Petitioner Daniel Mytels' Petition to confirm contractual arbitration award is continued to November 13, 2018 for further briefing to comport with due process wherein a judge rules on a ground that are similar but not on the parties papers. The court will send the parties with a law on that one point about uncertainties to be resolved in favor of arbitration. Response to be filed by October 22, 2018. Plaintiff's Reply to be filed by October 29, 2018. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk

Notice Of Hearing (On Petition To Confirm Arbitration)
Off Calendar Sep-13-2018 Continued To Oct-04-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

PETITIONER DANIEL MYTELS' NOTICE OF HEARING (ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION)

There being no appearance, the Court adopted the tentative ruling:

CONTINUED to October 4, 2018 per agreement of parties.

Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/ACM)
